top_signals.title: US lawmakers weigh aviation fuel cost increase from Iran war in fiscal 2027 defense hearing
top_signals.summary: Ahead of drafting fiscal year 2027’s NDAA, U.S. lawmakers are grappling with the rise in fuel prices and what it means for the military's aviation costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
